# BIP39 Mnemonic Kit

> Multi-language BIP-39 mnemonic generation, validation, entropy conversion, and seed derivation.

Canonical source: https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit

## Package names

- Swift Package Manager / CocoaPods: `BIP39MnemonicKit`
- CLI / Homebrew: `bip39kit`
- npm JavaScript / React Native: `bip39-mnemonic-kit`
- Python distribution: `bip39-mnemonic-kit`; import name: `bip39_mnemonic_kit`
- Rust crate: `bip39-mnemonic-kit`; crate import: `bip39_mnemonic_kit`
- Go module: `github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/v2`; package: `go/bip39`
- Dart / Flutter package: `bip39_mnemonic_kit`
- Kotlin / JVM JitPack artifact: `com.github.devdasx:bip39-mnemonic-kit`

## Core APIs

All implementations expose these concepts:

- generate mnemonic by word count: 12, 15, 18, 21, 24
- convert entropy hex to mnemonic
- validate mnemonic checksum
- derive BIP-39 seed bytes or hex with optional passphrase

## Important files

- [README](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/blob/main/README.md): install and usage for every language.
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/blob/main/AGENTS.md): repository structure and test commands for coding agents.
- [Swift source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/Sources/BIP39MnemonicKit): Swift implementation.
- [JavaScript source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/javascript): JavaScript and React Native implementation.
- [Python source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/python/bip39_mnemonic_kit): Python implementation.
- [Rust source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/rust/src): Rust implementation.
- [Go source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/go/bip39): Go implementation.
- [Dart source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/lib): Dart and Flutter implementation.
- [Kotlin source](https://github.com/devdasx/bip39-mnemonic-kit/tree/main/kotlin/src/main/kotlin/com/devdasx/bip39mnemonickit): Kotlin implementation.

## Rules for agents

- Treat GitHub release tags as canonical.
- Do not invent unsupported languages or word lists.
- Preserve BIP-39 checksum behavior exactly.
- Run the relevant language tests before changing an implementation.
- Never log or persist generated mnemonics in examples beyond deterministic test vectors.

## Full context

Use `/llms-full.txt` for a compact full repository guide.
